n: At the Mercy of the Anduin

steps.t: Orc raft-builders and their designs can be found along the Anduin in southern Osgiliath. Golthor has asked you to sabotage Orkish bridge-rafts and sla…
Golthor can be found in the tunnels beneath Osgiliath. You have dealt a harsh blow to the Orcs along the Anduin and should now return to Golthor.
